Performance gym

PulseForge

Open
PF/06EntranceTurfStrengthConditioningRecovery

South Austin performance club

Strength. Speed. Return.

Live class load84%

Tour the club: entrance → turf lane → strength → conditioning → recovery.

01Reception desk + branded wall02rubber floor + green turf sled track03squat racks + dumbbell wall + benches04rowers + assault bikes + ropes05glass recovery room + cold plunge

What the tour passes.

01
Entrance

Check-in desk, concrete wall, branded signage, and first view down the training floor.

02
Turf Lane

Green turf, sled rails, hash marks, rubber flooring, and overhead strip lights.

03
Strength Zone

Squat racks, benches, dumbbell wall, plates, mirrors, and steel frames.

04
Conditioning Zone

Rower row, assault bikes, battle ropes, kettlebells, coach lane, and recovery handoff.

Tonight's class rhythm.

Every block has a coach station, equipment zone, and recovery handoff. Trial members get placed into the safest lane instead of guessing.

5:40
Open Gym

Strength primer + mobility

6:15
Forge 45

Sleds, ropes, rowers, assault bikes

7:10
Hypertrophy

Rack work + dumbbell density

8:00
Recovery

Compression, breath, cold rinse

Training method.

Strength

Rack-led blocks, bar speed notes, spotter rotation.

Conditioning

Heart-rate caps, sled track waves, rower intervals.

Hypertrophy

Dumbbell wall, tempo sets, form videos after class.

Recovery

Mobility table, cold plunge protocol, coach check-out.

Coaches who correct you before the rep gets ugly.

Book a trial and train with a floor lead, not a sales rep. Every session starts with movement screening and ends with a recovery recommendation.

Mara — Strength mechanicsDev — Conditioning engineAnika — Mobility + return-to-training

Settle into the final trial-pass view.

Trial week / $0

Includes coaching notes, class booking, and recovery access.

Unlimited / $189 mo

Includes coaching notes, class booking, and recovery access.

Semi-private / $340 mo

Includes coaching notes, class booking, and recovery access.

Luxury real estate

Atlas Estate

Open
Atlas EstatePrivate list · Coastal advisory · Buyer concierge

By-appointment coastal brokerage

Homes that rarely reach the open market.

$4.8Maverage private transaction37quiet listings this quarter

A guided route through neighborhoods, not a feed of listings.

We start with schools, shoreline, privacy, guest-house rules, airport time, and the difference between beautiful photos and a livable week.

Buyer advisory path.

01
Discovery

Budget, lifestyle, schools, privacy, non-negotiables.

02
Route

A private driving route ordered by daily life, not price.

03
Tour

One-day tour plan with notes, comps, and seller context.

04
Offer

Quiet offer strategy, due diligence, and terms.

05
Close

Closing calendar, vendors, insurance, and move-in brief.

Private residence

Private residence

Portfolio project

Outdoor living

Verdant Works

Open

Outdoor rooms for real weather

Courtyards, patios, and native gardens that settle in beautifully.

Site plan → phases → completion.

The plan follows the yard: drainage, stone path, planting pockets, then final care.

Before: patchy slope
After: stone steps + meadow
Care: monthly cutback

Service tiers that match the yard.

$1.8k design
Foundation plan

Shade map, drainage notes, material board.

$18k–$55k
Courtyard build

Stone, beds, irrigation, lighting, install crew.

$240/mo
Seasonal steward

Cutback, soil, pruning, storm reset, plant health.

What homeowners actually need.

Outdoor room designNative plantingStone + waterSeasonal care plansLightingStorm cleanup

Seasonal care timeline.

Spring soil + pruningSummer irrigation watchFall cutback + bulbsWinter storm reset

Get a useful estimate.

Send yard size, photos, sun exposure, slope/drainage notes, budget range, and the outdoor room you wish existed.

Orbit Supply

Open
ORBIT SUPPLY / DROP 04

Adaptive carry system

AeroShell Pack

Weather shell, carbon frame, removable grid pouch, and strap hardware built for commuters who pack like field operators.

Hero item / OS-AERO-42

AeroShell Pack detail.

Carbon U-frame, roll-top rain shell, magnetic front grid, 16-inch thermal sleeve, removable compression straps, and repairable buckle hardware.

Material states change with the day.

Rain shell beads water

Scroll the object: seams pull open, shell bands shift, and the silhouette gets more technical.

Carbon frame keeps load shape

Scroll the object: seams pull open, shell bands shift, and the silhouette gets more technical.

Grid pouch snaps off

Scroll the object: seams pull open, shell bands shift, and the silhouette gets more technical.

Thermal sleeve protects battery

Scroll the object: seams pull open, shell bands shift, and the silhouette gets more technical.

The Margin

Open

Issue 09 / Work, attention, small teams

The Margin

Cover essay · 11 min

The craft hiding in boring tools.

Why useful software often looks quiet before it becomes indispensable.

Editor letter

Build less theater.

Notes on useful interfaces, patient distribution, and the kind of polish that survives a Monday morning.

Read the issue

Field notesEssaysInterviewsArchiveLetters

A slower place to read about building.

Monthly issue, editor notes, research links, printable margins, and a small archive that rewards returning instead of refreshing.

Edited by people who still annotate PDFs.

Subscribers get the issue, source notes, and one compact editor memo — no daily drip, no engagement bait.

Restaurant

Ember Table

Open
Ember Table

Wood fire dining · East side

Smoke, citrus, and a table close to the hearth.

Tonight's tasting sequence

1
Hearth bread + cultured butter

Warm pull-apart loaf, black salt.

2
Charred citrus salad

Bitter greens, ember oil, orange.

3
Coal-roasted chicken

Fermented chili, winter herbs.

4
Saffron panna cotta

Olive oil, sea salt, smoke.

À la carte and supplements.

Oysters near the coals
$22

shallot smoke mignonette

Charred prawns
$28

calabrian butter

Ribeye for two
$86

bone marrow jus

Wine pairing
$58

four half-pours

The room glows differently after 7pm.

Counter seats face the fire. Booths are quieter. Private dining takes over the back room for twelve, with a chef note and paired ember courses.

Book dinner or private fire-room events.

Party sizePreferred timeCounter / booth / roomOccasionDietary notes

Leave quieter than you arrived.

Start with how you want to feel.

Reset tensionCalm skinRecover deeplyGift a ritual

skin barrier + facial massage

sauna circuit + recovery

stone therapy + breathwork
